messages.content:
Translate to Spanish
"I am legitimately pissed when didn't get the XBOX720."
"Me enojé de verdad cuando no conseguí la XBOX720."

Translate to Spanish

"And they will do all this for you... in 3D!"
"Y harán todo esto por ti... ¡en 3D!"

Translate to Spanish

"I will leave your universe when I see an act of true kindness."
"Dejaré tu universo cuando vea un acto de verdadera bondad."

Translate to Spanish

"This world will not be kind to them. Your world will never be kind."
"Este mundo no será amable con ellos. Tu mundo nunca será amable."

Translate to Japanese (include romanization)

"I will leave your universe when I see an act of true kindness."

"本当の優しさを見たら、あなたの宇宙を去ります。"
(hontou no yasashisa o mitara, anata no uchuu o sarimasu.)

Translate to Japanese (include romanization)

"This world will not be kind to them. Your world will never be kind."

"この世界は彼らに優しくないでしょう。あなたの世界は決して優しくなることはありません。"
(Kono sekai wa karera ni yasashikunai deshou. Anata no sekai wa kesshite yasashiku naru koto wa arimasen.)

Translate to Spanish

"All the stars stand ready at your command, my grace."
"Todas las estrellas están listas a tu mando, mi gracia."

Translate to Latin

"All the stars stand ready at your command, my grace."
"Omnes stellae paratae ad imperium tuum stant, mea gratia."

Translate to Latin

"From one, many"
"Ex uno, multi"

Translate to Latin

"Once united, now must be divided."
"Olim uniti, nunc dividendi."
